title: ezkart Pack of 200 - Black Strong Plastic Nappy Bags with a Comfortable Grip| Heavy Duty for Multi-Purpose Uses, Durable Sanitary Disposal Bag, 100% Leak Proof (Black-200pk, 8x13x18 Inch-20mu)
features: These black nappy bags feature robust and ergonomic handles, providing a comfortable grip even when carrying heavy loads. They are 100% leak-proof for added reliability, Dimension:8x13x18 Inch-20mu

Versatile: Our nappy bags are designed to accommodate both large, heavy incontinence products as well as smaller ones. With dimensions of approximately 18 inches (height) x 13 inches (width) x 8 inches (depth), they offer ample space and can hold up to 7 litres of liquid, ensuring you never have to worry about “squeezing” anything in.

Strong: Made from 20-micron thick material, our adult nappy disposal bags are much stronger than the competition. This robust construction allows them to hold substantial weight without breaking, preventing any accidents from occurring.
Easy Tie Handles: The long tie handles make sealing and securing the bags a breeze, ensuring no odours or unpleasant scents escape once you've used the bag.

Discrete: With their black, opaque material, our disposable bags maintain your privacy and discretion. While they may appear to be ordinary plastic bags, they are specially designed for sanitary and incontinence pads and nappies.
UK Local Business: Proudly manufactured in the UK, our nappy sacks are sold by a UK-based local business. Crafted from 100% recycled HDPE, they provide an Eco-friendly solution for your needs.
